sqlMap.select: SELECT id FROM sys_file_t WHERE fileallName = '$fileallName$'

select GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS fileName, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.fileallName ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS fileallName, GROUP_CONCAT( ft1.validflag ORDER BY ft1.id SEPARATOR ',' ) AS addOperator from sys_file_t ft1 where FIND_IN_SET( ft1.id, '$fileattachments$')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file_t (fileName,fileallName,validflag,addOperator,addTime) VALUES ('$fileName$','$fileallName$',1,'$addOperator$','$addTime$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file_t WHERE id in $idstr$
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM sys_file_t WHERE id in $idstr$
